name: GENERAL DYNAMICS CORP
summary: General Dynamics is a global aerospace and defense company organized into four segments: Aerospace, Marine Systems, Combat Systems, and Technologies. It produces Gulfstream business jets and aircraft services via Jet Aviation; designs and builds nuclear-powered submarines and surface combatants; manufactures land combat vehicles, weapon systems, and munitions; and provides IT and technology services. Revenue in 2025 was led by defense segments alongside a growing aerospace business.

products.name: Gulfstream G800
products.description: Ultra-long-range, ultra-large-cabin business jet with 8,200-nautical-mile range at Mach 0.85; entered service in 2025 after FAA certification in April 2025.

products.name: Gulfstream G700
products.description: Ultra-long-range, ultra-large-cabin business jet with Symmetry Flight Deck; entered service in 2024.

products.name: Gulfstream G500
products.description: Large-cabin business jet entered service in 2018; best-in-class speed, fuel efficiency, and range.

products.name: Gulfstream G600
products.description: Large-cabin business jet entered service in 2019; clean-sheet design with new wing, avionics, and fuselage.

products.name: Gulfstream G400
products.description: Large-cabin business jet under development from a clean-sheet design, expanding Gulfstream family commonality.

products.name: Gulfstream G300
products.description: Super midsize business jet announced in second half of 2025; features Panoramic Windows and all-new Harmony Flight Deck.

products.name: Columbia-class ballistic-missile submarine
products.description: 12-boat nuclear submarine program providing strategic deterrent; first delivery expected 2028; program value exceeds $125 billion.

products.name: Virginia-class attack submarine
products.description: Nuclear-powered attack submarine built with an industry partner; 14 boats in backlog scheduled for delivery through 2034.

products.name: Virginia Payload Module
products.description: 84-foot Electric Boat-designed hull section adding four payload tubes, included in Block V Virginia-class submarines.

products.name: Jet Aviation FBO Network
products.description: Global fixed-base operator network of approximately 30 facilities on four continents offering maintenance, completion, and refurbishment services.

products.name: Aircraft MRO Services
products.description: Maintenance, repair, and overhaul services supporting over 3,000 Gulfstream aircraft globally, including 24/7 customer support and FAST rapid-response unit.

partnerships.description: Prime contractor relationship for Columbia-class and Virginia-class submarine programs and surface combatant construction.
Collaborates with Electric Boat on Virginia-class Block IV and V submarine construction.
Assembles Gulfstream midsize aircraft outside the United States.
